pi_items.source: O*NET Online SOC code lookup for 19-3051.00.
Matches standard occupational industry classifications for urban planning (e.g., NAICS 5413).
setup_task.sh copies files from /workspace/data/bologna_pasubio/ into the scenario directory.
Task description and verifier.py check for C1 requiring new_stops_added >= 4.
Task description and verifier.py check for C2 requiring express_count >= 3.
Task description and verifier.py check for C3 requiring person_trips >= 50.
Task description requires staggered departure times with a headway of approximately 600 seconds.
export_result.sh and task description specify this exact path for the CSV report.
export_result.sh and task description specify this exact path for the text summary.

privileged_info_summary: The task asks the agent to redesign public transit in the Bologna Pasubio scenario, a real-world SUMO dataset representing the city of Bologna. The scenario data contains an initial state of 25 bus stops and 112 bus vehicles. The agent must add at least 4 new bus stops, create an express bus line with at least 3 vehicles dispatched at 600-second headways, and generate at least 50 public transit person trips. Finally, the agent must output a transit service report to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/transit_service_report.csv and a text summary to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/transit_redesign_summary.txt.
